Remake.

Sorry I wasn't uploading for the last few days guys. My hamster has passed away and I've been really down from that. I've had her for three years and yeah.

On a different note, my friend gave me one of his hamsters. His name is Mikki so it helps me grieve ❤️

Were so close to 5K followers! Thank you guys so much. The special might take me a lot longer, please bare with me.

Remember to hydrate and eat!

Much love,
Steph.
